summary: Verified Portuguese (pt.json) and Chinese (zh.json) locale translations are complete and working. All 10 locale files have exactly 1640 synchronized keys. Language switching works correctly on both Auth page and Dashboard. Translations display properly in native languages.

zh.json has proper Chinese translations (common, nav, auth, dashboard, reports, settings, pms, folio, booking, calendar) - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 locale files have exactly 1640 synchronized keys as required
Portuguese translations are complete with proper native text (not English fallback)
Chinese translations are complete with proper native text (not English fallback)
i18n.jsx correctly imports all 10 locale files

context_for_next_testing_agent: Portuguese and Chinese locale translations are now complete with 1640 keys each. All translations display correctly in the UI. Language switching works on both Auth page and Dashboard. The previous issue of ~67% English fallback in pt.json and zh.json has been resolved - both files now have proper native translations.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: pt.json and zh.json had ~67% English fallback text instead of proper native translations
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Main agent completed the native translations for all sections in pt.json and zh.json
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All key sections (common, nav, auth, dashboard, reports, settings, pms, folio, booking, calendar) now display proper Portuguese and Chinese text
